Base class for architecture ID classes.

Mutable so we can calculate component masses and costs.

InverterSimpleData.description: Wrapper for inverter simple model to handle units.

Item with blobs.

Used in the library to detect whether this is item that has associated S3 blobs.

MotorConfiguration.title: MotorConfiguration
MotorConfiguration.description: Configuration that can change characteristics of the motor.

MotorLabData.title: MotorLabData
MotorLabData.description:
Motor Lab Data.

Model is held as a dict, exported from Lab.

MotorLabDataInDB.title: MotorLabDataInDB
MotorLabDataInDB.description:
Lab dictionary in Database.

Can also contain the thermal model.

MotorLabID.title: MotorLabID
MotorLabID.description: Motor Lab with the data referenced by ID.

MotorLossMapData.title: MotorLossMapData
MotorLossMapData.description:
Motor Loss Map.

Input lists are two-dimensional, with each sub-list referring to
a different voltage.

MotorLossMapID.title: MotorLossMapID
MotorLossMapID.description: Motor Loss Map ID. Data referenced by ID.

MotorState.title: MotorState
MotorState.description:
Variables that define state of a motor.

Essentially these are mostly all inputs to a Lab operating point calculation.

MotorTorqueCurves.title: MotorTorqueCurves
MotorTorqueCurves.description: Create a motor from torque speed curves.

MotorTorqueCurvesData.title: MotorTorqueCurvesData
MotorTorqueCurvesData.description:
Motor torque curve data.

Input lists are two-dimensional, with each sub-list referring to
a different voltage.

MotorTorqueCurvesID.title: MotorTorqueCurvesID
MotorTorqueCurvesID.description: Motor Lab with the data referenced by ID.

PWMFrequencyDefinition.title: PWMFrequencyDefinition
PWMFrequencyDefinition.description: How user has defined PWM frequency.

Requirement.title: Requirement
Requirement.description:
A way to get the actual requirement from the Union.

Use Requirement().root on an object or dictionary.

https://docs.pydantic.dev/latest/concepts/models/#helper-funct

RequirementsSolved.title: RequirementsSolved
RequirementsSolved.description:
A way to get the actual component from the Union.

Use RequirementsSolved() uses keywords arguments or dictionary.
use RequirementsSolved.model_validate() on an object or dictionary .

https://docs.pydantic.dev/latest/concepts/models/#helper-funct

StaticRequirement.title: StaticRequirement
StaticRequirement.description: Static requirement with both torque and acceleration.

StaticRequirementSolved.title: StaticRequirementSolved
StaticRequirementSolved.description: Solution to static requirement given to APP.

SurfaceConditionTractionConfigs.title: SurfaceConditionTractionConfigs
SurfaceConditionTractionConfigs.description: Surface conditions that affect the traction coefficient.

ThermalModelSolver.title: ThermalModelSolver
ThermalModelSolver.description:
Thermal model.

Contains the thermal network defined by nodes and edges, and mappings of which nodes
correspond to which losses and temperatures.

additionalProperties.description: A NetworkX DiGraph serialized as node-link data.

ThermalNetwork.title: ThermalNetwork
ThermalNetwork.description:
Lumped parameter thermal network.

It is constructed from sets of nodes and edges (connections) at different speeds
and flow rates.

Fields:
    speed_dict (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to speed values.
    flow_rate_dict (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to flow rate values.
    edges (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to edge lists.
    nodes (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to node lists.

TransientCalculationPoint.title: TransientCalculationPoint
TransientCalculationPoint.description:
Drive Cycle Point.

index (int): index of the point within the calculation
duration (float): length of the time step
speed (float): speed at the end of the time step
gradient (float): gradient of the time step
distance (float): distance travelled during the time step
acceleration (float): acceleration during the time step, calculate from
                      the speed of this point and the previous point

TransientTotalValues.title: TransientTotalValues
TransientTotalValues.description: Total values over the course of a transient calculation.

TransmissionLossCoefficients.title: TransmissionLossCoefficients
TransmissionLossCoefficients.description: Input values for transmission model for fixed efficiencies.

TransmissionLossMap.title: TransmissionLossMap
TransmissionLossMap.description: Input values for transmission model with loss data.

TransmissionLossMapData.title: TransmissionLossMapData
TransmissionLossMapData.description:
Data for transmission loss maps.

2D lists, one list per gear ratio.

TransmissionLossMapID.title: TransmissionLossMapID
TransmissionLossMapID.description: Transmission Loss Map ID. Data referenced by ID.

TransmissionNeglect.title: TransmissionNeglect
TransmissionNeglect.description:
Placeholder class for when neglecting transmission.

This is used when we have in wheel motors.

UnitChoices.title: UnitChoices
UnitChoices.description:
Unit Choice for the analysis.

We might not need all of these.
We might want to create preset groups of these (eg. MKS, Imperial ect)

WheelInput.title: WheelInput
WheelInput.description:
Wheel as a configuration.

This is what is stored in the database and the class used for creation.

WheelRollingResistanceConfigs.title: WheelRollingResistanceConfigs
WheelRollingResistanceConfigs.description: Condition on wheels which affect the rolling resistance coefficient.
